In auto doing, there is no Kriya chesta.

When you try to do two things, it is not possible.
One of them will go into auto doing and the other will go into real doing.
So in the in the traffic, your doing will go into the real doing, handling the traffic
and your chanting will go into auto doing.
Ultimately Krishna wants conscious doing.
He wants us to consciously call out.
Even a tape recorder can call out Krishna, Krishna, Krishna, Krishna.
But you call out Krishna, Krishna, Krishna, Krishna.
Or you mechanically call out Krishna, Krishna, Krishna, Krishna.
Krishna knows what is this.
His tongue is calling, his mouth is calling, but he is not calling.
You need your attention, Kriyachesta.
